name: Arotinolol
description: Arotinolol is a medication in the class of mixed alpha/beta blockers.
indication: Used in the treatment of high blood pressure.

interactions.name: Floctafenine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Arotinolol is combined with Floctafenine.

interactions.name: Methacholine
interactions.description: Arotinolol may increase the bronchoconstrictory activities of Methacholine.

interactions.name: Rivastigmine
interactions.description: Arotinolol may increase the bradycardic activities of Rivastigmine.
